overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game resembling GTA V, showing a female character walking through an urban plaza with modern high-rise buildings and scattered trees. A blue sedan passes by midway through the clip on the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with beige office building

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily forward through the open plaza toward the tall buildings in the distance

entered.detail: low-rise beige building with dark horizontal windows
tall residential tower with horizontal stripes
green leafy trees scattered throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a wide urban plaza with dirt ground. A beige office building stands to the right while tall striped residential towers rise in the distance. The area is empty of pedestrians and vehicles, with scattered trees providing shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching large central tree

events.description: blue sedan drives from right to left passing in front of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as a car passes by from the right

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large mature tree with spreading canopy directly ahead
tall building with dark glass facade
blue four-door sedan crossing the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large central tree in the plaza. A blue sedan suddenly appears from the right and drives past toward the left. The beige office building falls behind while a dark glass building becomes visible on the left. The tall striped tower grows larger in the center view.

agents.ego_description: walking past the large central tree and continuing through the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large central tree, which moves to the left and falls behind. The blue sedan has exited the frame. The character continues walking toward the tall striped tower, which now dominates the center view, while the dark glass building remains visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet urban plaza that gradually narrows its focus toward a towering residential skyscraper. It begins with the character walking across a wide dirt expanse, flanked by a beige office building and scattered shade trees under a clear sky. As the character approaches a large central tree, a blue sedan suddenly cuts across the path from right to left, shifting the perspective away from the beige office and toward a dark glass building on the left. The scene then opens further as the sedan exits the frame and the central tree falls behind, leaving the character to advance toward the tall striped tower. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory until the massive residential tower dominates the center of the view.
